name: flowlm
description: FlowLM — a visual-first flowchart desktop app with AI-readable Mermaid output
author: Sam

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @flowlm/core && npm run dev -w @flowlm/desktop
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @flowlm/core && npm run dev:web -w @flowlm/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build -w @flowlm/core && npm run build -w @flowlm/desktop && npm run build -w @flowlm/mcp
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @flowlm/core && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w @flowlm/core && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
